---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for MD-Chat
labels: enhancement, triage
---

## Problem statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them?

## Layer
Which layer of the architecture does this affect?
- [ ] 1 Transport (E2EE messaging)
- [ ] 2 Identity (EVO / MPass / eIDAS)
- [ ] 3 Payments (Wero / SEPA / MIA)
- [ ] 4 Apps (mini-apps + bots)
- [ ] 5 AI Layer (Digital Twins, summarization)
- [ ] 6 Government (MSign / MDelivery)
- [ ] 7 Commerce (CRM, business profile)
- [ ] 8 Social (stories, channels, communities)

## Compliance
Does this affect GDPR, AI Act, eEvidence, or CRA obligations?
